title: eragrostis benguelensis
intro: Eragrostis benguelensis, also known as Benguela grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis benguelensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are said to offer relief from various health conditions.
